text: There is something solemn and mysterious about being here. It feels as though I am wandering through an empty office late at night, where the shadows and silence are heavy. My mind becomes contemplative, as I sense both the latent energy of unfinished business and the strange isolation of absence. The dim light and tilted perspective heighten the sense of introspection, making me question the purpose and rhythms of these human-made spaces. In this stillness, I feel small and alert, quietly aware of the presence of things unseen.
